name: Armodafinil
summary: The more potent of the two modafinil isomers, said to have a longer duration and lesser side effects. Sometimes prescribed for ADHD and daytime sleepiness.

legacy.addictionPotential: mildly addictive with a low potential for abuse

tolerance.full: develops with prolonged and repeated use

toxicities: The median lethal dose at which 50% of participants die (LD50) from either armodafinil or modafinil for human beings has never been reached
